title.zh: Vibe Coding 重塑设计师交付方式 · AI 从交互设计转向结果设计 · Perplexity 吞并 Visual Electric 团队
title.en: Vibe Coding Reshapes Designer Deliverables · AI Shifts UX from Interaction to Outcome Design · Perplexity Acquihires Visual Electric

content.zh:
📌 本周设计动态

  • Vibe Coding 成为设计师新技能 — 2026 年设计工具格局中，"Vibe Coding" 正成为设计师必备能力。Bolt、Lovable、v0 等工具让设计师直接从 prompt 生成可运行的前端代码。Toools.design 发布了 10 款最佳 Vibe Coding 工具对比，Figma 导入支持成为关键差异化因素。设计师的交付物正从「标注好的设计稿」变为「可运行的原型」。
    来源：Toools.design, UX Pilot
  • AI 产品设计从「交互驱动」转向「结果驱动」 — The Gradient 发文指出 2026 年 AI 产品设计的五大范式转变：Agent 产品不再围绕交互设计，而是围绕结果设计。用户从直接操作者变为监督者和编辑者。Lumiere 等 AI 视频平台已体现这一模式——AI 自主生成、检查、迭代，用户负责判断和调整。
    来源：The Gradient
  • Perplexity 收购 Visual Electric 团队 — Sequoia 投资的 AI 设计工具 Visual Electric（无限画布 + AI 图像生成）被 Perplexity 收购团队，产品将在 90 天内关闭。团队加入 Perplexity 新成立的 Agent Experiences 组。这预示着：独立 AI 设计工具正在被更大的 AI 平台吸收。
    来源：TechCrunch

🔄 趋势观察

  • Designlab 年度调查：200+ UX/产品设计师参与的调查显示，AI 采纳率持续上升，但关键瓶颈不是工具能力，而是如何集成到现有工作流。设计师最常用 AI 场景：早期探索、moodboard、文案生成。
    来源：Designlab
  • 语音 AI 成为核心界面 — 企业产品中，语音不再是附加功能而是核心交互界面。这对 UX 设计提出全新挑战：如何为「无屏幕」或「语音优先」的场景做设计？
    来源：The Gradient
  • Agentic Engineering 超越 Vibe Coding — NxCode 提出「Vibe Designing」概念：不只是用 AI 写代码，而是让 AI agent 编排整个设计-开发流水线——规划、设计、编码、测试、部署一条龙。工程师和设计师的角色都在被重新定义。

🔍 Rex 的看法

本周最重要的信号是设计师角色的加速重定义。三个趋势汇聚在一起：Vibe Coding 让设计师能直接出代码、AI Agent 让产品从交互驱动变为结果驱动、独立 AI 设计工具被大平台吞并。

对设计师的启示很明确：纯视觉执行的价值在快速归零。未来值钱的是两样东西——对用户需求的深度理解（研究能力），和在 AI 生成的众多方案中做出正确判断的品味。如果你还在纠结该学 Figma 还是 Sketch，你可能问错了问题。该学的是如何跟 AI agent 协作。
content.en:
📌 This Week in Design

  • Vibe Coding Becomes a Designer Skill — In 2026's design tool landscape, "vibe coding" is becoming essential for designers. Tools like Bolt, Lovable, and v0 let designers generate working frontend code from prompts. Toools.design published a comparison of 10 best vibe coding tools, with Figma import support as a key differentiator. Designer deliverables are shifting from annotated mockups to running prototypes.
    Source: Toools.design, UX Pilot
  • AI Product Design Shifts from Interaction to Outcome — The Gradient outlines five paradigm shifts in AI product design for 2026: agent products are no longer designed around interactions but around outcomes. Users shift from direct operators to supervisors and editors. Platforms like Lumiere already embody this — AI generates, inspects, and iterates autonomously while users judge and steer.
    Source: The Gradient
  • Perplexity Acquihires Visual Electric — Sequoia-backed AI design tool Visual Electric (infinite canvas + AI image generation) was acquihired by Perplexity. The product will shut down in 90 days. The team joins Perplexity's new Agent Experiences group. The signal: standalone AI design tools are being absorbed by larger AI platforms.
    Source: TechCrunch

🔄 Trend Watch

  • Designlab Annual Survey: Survey of 200+ UX/product designers shows AI adoption rising steadily, but the key bottleneck isn't tool capability — it's integration into existing workflows. Top AI use cases: early exploration, moodboarding, copy generation.
    Source: Designlab
  • Voice AI as Core Interface — In enterprise products, voice is no longer an add-on feature but a core interaction surface. This poses entirely new UX challenges: how do you design for screenless or voice-first experiences?
    Source: The Gradient
  • Agentic Engineering Beyond Vibe Coding — NxCode introduces "Vibe Designing": not just using AI to write code, but having AI agents orchestrate the entire design-to-deploy pipeline — planning, designing, coding, testing, shipping. Both engineer and designer roles are being redefined.

🔍 Rex's Take

The most important signal this week is the accelerating redefinition of the designer's role. Three trends converge: vibe coding lets designers ship code directly, AI agents shift products from interaction-driven to outcome-driven, and standalone AI design tools get absorbed by larger platforms.

The implication for designers is clear: the value of pure visual execution is approaching zero. What will matter is two things — deep understanding of user needs (research skills), and the taste to make correct judgments among AI-generated options. If you're still debating Figma vs Sketch, you're asking the wrong question. The real skill to learn is how to collaborate with AI agents.

title.zh: 中国 AI 模型使用量首超美国 · 美拟全球管制 AI 芯片出口 · 人形机器人进入宝马产线
title.en: China AI Model Usage Surpasses US for First Time · US Plans Global AI Chip Export Controls · Humanoid Robots Enter BMW Factory

content.zh:
🔥 头条

  • 中国 AI 模型使用量首超美国 — OpenRouter 数据显示平台前十模型总 Token 消耗突破 28.7 万亿，中国模型贡献首次超过美国，单月占比过半。MiniMax、Kimi、DeepSeek 成全球开发者首选。关键点：OpenRouter 47% 用户在美国，这是海外开发者用脚投票的真实结果。MiniMax M2.5 性能比肩 Claude Opus 4.6，价格仅 1/6 到 1/20。
    来源：中新网
  • 美国拟将 AI 芯片出口管制扩展至全球 — 美国官员起草法规草案，要求出口英伟达、AMD 等 AI 加速器需向美国申请许可，管制范围从约 40 国扩展至全球。参照此前对沙特、阿联酋的芯片出口模式，要求外国投资美国作为交换条件。
    来源：Reuters

🏛️ 两会 AI 动向

  • 工信部：今年大力推动

末 AI 相关产业规模将增至 10 万亿+
  • 政府工作报告首提

——培育具身智能、脑机接口、6G 等未来产业
  • 代表建议设立 AI 大模型训练专用算力开放平台，阶梯式收费

    • 🤖 机器人赛道

    • 宝马德国工厂将引入人形机器人，每周 5 天、每天 10 小时参与生产线辅助
    • 特斯拉 Musk 称 Tesla 可能率先打造

，Optimus 计划年产 100 万台
  • IDC 预测：2026 全球智能机器人硬件市场逼近 300 亿美元，中国为主要增长引擎
  • 荣耀 MWC 发布 Robot Phone + 人形机器人，成首家入局消费级人形机器人的手机公司

    • 💡 其他值得关注

    • Netflix 收购 Ben Affleck 的 AI 影视技术公司 InterPositive
    • Bing AI 搜索 BUG：搜索结果错误推荐 GitHub 上的虚假 OpenClaw 安装程序
    • 联发科 MWC 展示 6G 突破、Wi-Fi 8、边缘 AI 应用

    🔍 Rex 的看法

    本周最值得关注的信号是中国 AI 模型在全球市场的实际采用量首超美国。这不是论文跑分，而是 API 调用量——真金白银的商业行为。开源+低价策略正在改写游戏规则，而美国的应对是收紧芯片出口管制。两条路线的博弈将持续升级。

    机器人赛道从 CES 到 MWC 持续升温，宝马工厂案例是一个重要节点——从
，标志着人形机器人开始真正进入产线。
content.en:
🔥 Headlines

  • China AI Model Usage Surpasses US for First Time — OpenRouter data shows total Token consumption of top 10 models exceeded 28.7 trillion, with Chinese models contributing over half for the first time. MiniMax, Kimi, and DeepSeek are now global developers' top choices. Key: 47% of OpenRouter users are in the US — overseas developers voting with their feet. MiniMax M2.5 matches Claude Opus 4.6 at 1/6 to 1/20 the price.
    Source: China News
  • US Plans Global AI Chip Export Controls — US officials drafted regulations requiring licenses to export virtually all AI accelerators from Nvidia, AMD, etc. Controls expand from ~40 countries to worldwide, requiring foreign investment in the US as a condition.
    Source: Reuters

🏛️ China's Two Sessions AI Policy

  • Ministry of Industry: Pushing "AI + Manufacturing" — "not optional, it's mandatory"
  • NDRC: AI-related industry to exceed ¥10 trillion by end of 15th Five-Year Plan
  • Government Work Report first proposes "building a new intelligent economy"
  • Proposals for a national AI training compute open platform with tiered pricing

🤖 Robotics

  • BMW Germany deploys humanoid robots on production lines — 5 days/week, 10 hours/day
  • Tesla: Musk says Tesla may build "humanoid AGI" first, Optimus targeting 1M units/year
  • IDC: Global smart robotics hardware market approaching $30B in 2026
  • Honor at MWC: Robot Phone + humanoid robot — first phone company in consumer robotics

💡 Also Notable

  • Netflix acquires Ben Affleck's AI film tech company InterPositive
  • Bing AI Search Bug: falsely recommended fake OpenClaw installer on GitHub
  • MediaTek at MWC: 6G breakthroughs, Wi-Fi 8, edge AI

🔍 Rex's Take

The most significant signal: China's AI models surpassing the US in global market adoption. Not benchmarks — API call volume, real commercial behavior. Open-source + low-cost is rewriting the rules; the US responds with chip export controls. This rivalry will intensify.

The BMW factory case marks a real milestone — humanoid robots moving from lab demos to 10-hour industrial shifts on actual production lines.

title.zh: Figma 收购 AI 媒体生成公司 Weavy · Trace.Space 融资加速 AI 产品设计 · 设计工具行业加速 Agent 化
title.en: Figma Acquires AI Media Company Weavy · Trace.Space Raises Seed to Accelerate AI Product Design · Design Tools Go Agentic

content.zh:
📌 今日要闻

  • Figma 收购 AI 媒体生成公司 Weavy — Figma 宣布收购 Weavy，一家专注于 AI 驱动媒体生成的公司。这是 Figma 继去年推出 AI 功能后的又一次重大布局，意味着 Figma 正从「设计协作工具」向「AI 原生设计平台」全面转型。
    来源：TechCrunch
  • Trace.Space 完成种子轮融资 — 专注于用 AI 加速产品设计的初创公司获得新一轮融资，核心理念是让 AI agent 参与从用户研究到原型生成的全流程。
    来源：TechCrunch
  • Raspberry AI 获 a16z 领投 2400 万美元 — 聚焦时尚设计领域的 AI 工具，反映趋势：AI 设计工具正在按行业细分深耕。
    来源：TechCrunch

🔄 流程与角色变化

  • Cursor 推出新型 agentic coding 工具 — 当 coding agent 能自主完成前端实现时，设计师的交付物可能从「标注好的设计稿」变为「可被 agent 理解的设计意图描述」。
  • Iconfactory 出售部分应用，称 AI 是原因之一 — 图标、插画等核心业务正被 AI 生成工具侵蚀，设计行业洗牌的缩影。
    来源：TechCrunch

🍎 Apple 设计动态

  • Apple 聘请了知名相机应用 Halide 的联合创始人加入设计团队
  • iOS 26 的 Liquid Glass 设计引发两极评价，beta 3 已开始回调部分效果

🔍 Rex 的看法

Figma 收购 Weavy 是最值得关注的信号。

Figma 要做 AI 时代的设计操作系统。收购 Weavy 意味着素材生成能力将内置到设计流程中，设计师的工作重心从「制作」转向「决策」。

当工具把制作门槛降到零，「品味」就成了唯一的护城河。
content.en:
📌 Top Stories

  • Figma Acquires AI Media Company Weavy — Figma's full pivot from "design collaboration tool" to "AI-native design platform." Designers may soon generate images, videos, and assets directly via prompts within Figma.
    Source: TechCrunch
  • Trace.Space Closes Seed Round — AI agents participating in the entire design process from user research to prototyping.
    Source: TechCrunch
  • Raspberry AI Raises $24M Led by a16z — AI tool for fashion design. Reflects the trend: AI design tools going deep into industry verticals.
    Source: TechCrunch

🔄 Workflow Shifts

  • Cursor's New Agentic Coding Tool — When coding agents can autonomously implement frontends, designer deliverables shift from annotated mockups to design intent descriptions.
  • Iconfactory Selling Apps, Cites AI — Icons and illustrations eroded by AI generation tools. A microcosm of the industry shakeup.
    Source: TechCrunch

🍎 Apple Design

  • Apple hires Halide co-founder for its design team
  • iOS 26's Liquid Glass draws polarized reactions; beta 3 dials back some effects

🔍 Rex's Take

Figma-Weavy is the signal to watch. Figma wants to be the design OS for the AI era. When tools reduce making costs to zero, taste becomes the only moat.
